purpose: Check that the tiny-cuda-nn Neural Cache can directly fit simple deterministic targets before interpreting NC/2LMC results.

expected.constant_one: training RMSE should become small very quickly; failure suggests a training/inference path bug
expected.harmonic_x2_minus_y2: low-frequency exact target should be easy
expected.boundary_texture_stripes_k16: hard deterministic target; use to compare cache capacity
